text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After my training session with Eishin Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, Nakayama. Are you about to begin training?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You could say that... But I ain't feelin' it right
now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Are you under the weather, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That ain't it. There's just nothing thrillin' about
practice, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can't say I've ever thought about that before...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you try doing pair running with a
partner?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Pair runnin'? Now that sounds fun! Some fierce competition oughta do the trick.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who brought it up, so why don't
you be my running partner?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Me? I suppose that would be fine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer. May I have your permission to
join Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If it is thrilling competition you crave, then I will
not hold back. I shall do my utmost to meet your
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh! Haha! I like the way you think!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the two dive right into pair running.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Too much practice can certainly be
detrimental.
choice_data_list: You can go pair running another day!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes! That would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but can we reschedule for another
time? When do you have an opening?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Not happy with just a verbal agreement, huh?
You sure like to do things clean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Eishin Flash sets up a day to go pair running
with Nakayama Festa, she goes right back to her
dorm.
